description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content Updated (Published: June 22, 2026)

AI Summary (For accurate information, please check the original articles)

Press Release Materials List (Fiscal Year 2026 Reiwa 8)

【Published June 22, 2026】
Published the public version of the investigation report on serious bullying incidents.

【June 3, 2026】
Conducting a market sounding survey for future use of the former Mukohara Housing Complex site. Soliciting proposals and feedback from private businesses on how to utilize the site.

【April 30, 2026】
Implementing year-round dress code flexibility for city staff (no tie required).

【April 24, 2026】
Received a donation from Ome Shinkin Bank to Hanno City.

【April 22, 2026】
Launching the Arima Area Water Source Forest Conservation Project (nicknamed "Crested Eagle and Hazel Dormouse Forest Project").

【April 20, 2026】
Held a donation presentation ceremony from Hanno Rotary Club to Hanno City.

【April 6, 2026】
Received a donation from MX Mobililing Co., Ltd. through the corporate version of hometown tax donation program.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025_1/13388.html
summary: ℹ️ Press Release Materials (Fiscal Year 2026 Reiwa 8)
